brand_identity.name: DuoHealth
brand_identity.core_concept: Two as One: Consistency through Partnership

layout_system.spacing_scale: Generous (2x standard). Base unit p-6 or p-8 for containers.

grids.mobile: Single column. Vertical stacking. 80vh max image height.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-stone-900 border border-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-50 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium transition-colors

cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-stone-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-white border-stone-200 rounded-xl h-12 px-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all shadow-sm

navigation.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-6 left-6 right-6 bg-stone-900/90 backdrop-blur-lg text-white rounded-full p-2 flex justify-between items-center shadow-2xl z-50
navigation.desktop_nav: fixed top-0 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-stone-100 z-50 h-20

badges.streak: bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-bold flex items-center gap-1

textures.noise: fixed inset-0 opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none z-50 mix-blend-overlay bg-noise-pattern

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-stone-500+ is used on light backgrounds.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect user preference. Use opacity fades instead of transforms.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid='kebab-case-name'

images.alt: Couple running together in morning light
images.description: Use for Landing Page Hero or 'Get Active' section

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to include the specific colors defined in this JSON.
Add the font Google links to index.html or import in CSS.
Use the 'Bento' grid layout for the dashboard: Large main widget (Completed today), medium widget (Partner's status), small widgets (Water/Mood).
Implement the 'Shared Streak' prominently with a celebratory animation when both partners complete.
Use 'Warm Sand' (#FAFAF9) as the global background color, NOT white.
NEVER use gradients for text. Keep text solid high-contrast.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts, no 'Inter' for headings.
Spacing: Use p-8 where you would usually use p-4.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should scale slightly on hover.
Glassmorphism: Use for sticky headers and overlays, but keep it subtle (white/80).
Data-Test-IDs: Mandatory for all interactive elements.
